behavior_summary: U8P_SLAYER::look is a minimal 'U8P_SLAYER::look' (examine) handler for the SLAYER NPC/object. When the player examines the entity, the script plays a single bark line: 'Slayer '.

Immediately after emitting the bark the process issues a suspend/terminate action (inferred from an unknown 'suspend' token), so the U8P_SLAYER::look handler yields/ends without branching or further interaction.
No menu, branching, flag reads/writes, or external calls are present in the U8P_SLAYER::look handler.

The file also contains item property metadata for a special weapon (baseDamage 4, damageModifier 11, damage types ['blunt','magic','slayer']) — this is metadata associated with the SLAYER entity but is not referenced by the U8P_SLAYER::look process.
notable_control_flow: Single linear control flow: U8P_SLAYER::look plays one bark then suspends/ends.
No conditional branches, no menu presentation, and no calls to other in-project functions from the U8P_SLAYER::look handler.
open_questions: What exact runtime effect does the inferred 'suspend' have here (full termination of the U8P_SLAYER::look process vs. yielding to the engine)?

Is the declared itemProperties block (weapon stats) intended to be equipped by the SLAYER NPC or simply present as metadata in this file? There is no code linking the U8P_SLAYER::look handler to that item data.
Are there other event handlers (e.g., talk, use, enterFastArea) for this entity elsewhere that reference the weapon properties or provide richer behavior?

main_function.name: U8P_SLAYER::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description / single-line response when the player examines the SLAYER NPC; play the bark 'Slayer ' and then end or yield the U8P_SLAYER::look process.
entry_conditions: Player performs a 'U8P_SLAYER::look' or examine action targeting the SLAYER entity (engine invokes process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_SLAYER::look
function_map.role: short description / examine handler that emits one bark and suspends

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_SLAYER::look is a minimal 'U8P_SLAYER::look' (examine) handler for the SLAYER NPC/object. When the player examines the entity, the script plays a single bark line: 'Slayer '.
